description_long: This is a military-style, twin-engine propeller airplane with a green camouflage paint scheme and distinctive white and black invasion stripes on the wings and fuselage. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, featuring roundels and insignia typical of British Royal Air Force aircraft. The fuselage is streamlined, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit that appears to be multi-seat, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is visible and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The engines are mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller, and the overall design suggests a World War II-era combat or reconnaissance aircraft.
description: A green, twin-propeller military airplane with invasion stripes, mid-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. Features an enclosed, forward cockpit and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin propellers, engine nacelles, and the symmetrical straight wings with invasion stripes.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the green camouflage, roundels, invasion stripes, and the full wingspan with visible cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the trailing edges of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the undercarriage, tail wheel, and the underside of the wings with visible roundels and stripes.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with moderate dihedral and no winglets; features invasion stripes and roundels.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat canopy and clear windows.
